button.name: action_jo_reject_item
button.confirm: Reject this inspection? The item will return to In Progress for rework.

button.name: action_jo_close
button.confirm: Close this Job Order? Ensure all claims are fully recorded.

button.name: action_populate_resources
button.confirm: Populate planned material lines from the BOQ template? Existing lines will be preserved.

button.name: action_request_materials
button.confirm: Request all planned materials? This will create a stock transfer request.

button.name: action_jo_approve
button.title: Approve this Job Order to begin execution

button.name: action_populate_resources
button.confirm: Populate planned material lines from the BOQ template? Existing lines will be preserved.
button.title: Load BOQ resource lines into Materials tab

button.name: action_jo_start_execution
button.title: Start execution on this Job Order

button.name: action_sync_progress_from_logs
button.confirm: Re-sync Executed Qty from the sum of all progress log increments?
button.title: Re-sync executed qty from daily logs

button.name: action_jo_request_handover
button.title: Submit this item for client inspection

div.div: Financial extraction based on approved quantities

div.div: Birth records, breeding logs, head count

button.name: action_jo_start_execution

div.title: Open: Approved Stock for Sale
div.div: Weight gain targets and sale-ready head

button.name: action_jo_close
button.confirm: Close this Job Order? Ensure all claims are fully recorded.
button.title: Close this Job Order

page.name: execution_tab
page.div: Note: Executed Qty is a site measurement only. Progress % and all financial amounts are driven by Approved Qty (set after inspection on the Approved Quantities tab).
Over-executed. Executed qty exceeds contract qty. Review before requesting handover.

button.name: action_sync_progress_from_logs
button.confirm: Re-sync Executed Qty from the sum of all progress log increments?

page.name: handover_tab
page.div: Handover Requested. Awaiting inspection team to confirm receipt and start inspection.
Handover Rejected. Item was returned to In Progress. Rework required before re-submission.
Workflow: Execute the work (tab B), then click Request Handover in the header to submit for inspection.

field.name: handover_notes
field.placeholder: Handover punch-list, delivery confirmation, site sign-off…

page.name: inspection_tab
page.div: Under Inspection. Set Approved Qty and Rejected Qty below, then use Approve Item or Partially Approve from the header.

page.name: approved_tab
page.div: No approved quantities yet. Approved Qty is set during the Inspection & Approvals step. All progress % and financial amounts will be 0 until then.
Business Rule: Progress % = Approved Qty ÷ Contract Qty × 100 · Approved Amount = Approved Qty × Unit Price · Executed Qty does NOT generate financial entitlements.

page.name: claims_tab
page.div: Nothing to Claim. Approved Qty is fully claimed. No claimable balance remains.

field.name: tool_notes
field.placeholder: Tools required or deployed on site…

page.name: agri_tab
page.div: Agriculture Mode. Record field operations, irrigation, and harvest data here. approved_qty = certified harvest quantity drives revenue.

page.name: mfg_tab
page.div: Manufacturing Mode. Record packing output and QC results here. approved_qty = QC-released units drives finished goods value.

page.name: livestock_tab
page.div: Livestock Mode. Record herd composition, breeding, health and sale data here. approved_qty = approved head / weight for sale drives all revenue calculations.

field.name: help
field.p: Open an approved BOQ Analysis document and click Generate Job Orders to create execution records from approved analysis lines.
